Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Malice]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Malice gave Eithan her blessing.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Malice is a figure associated with the Akura clan.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice's children must prove themselves to be acknowledged as the Monarch’s true sons and daughters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice's direct descendants attempt to bond with Divine Treasures instead of a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice's descendants use special means to open their soulspace early for bonding with Divine Treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice's descendants are tested by Books in a dream-world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice's eyes blaze with pure, endless purple light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice is Mercy's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice has purple nails that may be crystallized.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Akura Malice emerges from shadow.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Malice is the mother of Akura Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan Arelius fights for Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is chosen of Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Malice stands in midair over her mountain.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Malice lounges on a Forged throne of shadows and has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Malice is a target for Sopharanatoth's Penance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Malice would rather die than leave the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Malice is a group represented by three Monarchs in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Malice's shadow madra is represented by black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Akura Malice is a Monarch whom Min Shuei appealed to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Malice has expectations of Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Akura Malice has a daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin had only seen Akura Malice from a distance or in blurry memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Malice is the Queen of Shadows and ruler of the western Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Malice follows the Path of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Malice is the creator of the Path of Seven Pages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Malice practices a pure shadow Path with an emphasis on Forger and Ruler techniques.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Malice made the original doorway Charity used.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Malice uses a bow with a shaft made of glacial ice that shimmers like moonbeams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Malice can use shadow tendrils to seize targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Malice is capable of communicating over great distances using a Monarch-level messenger construct that transmits her will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Malice is clad in armor of purple crystal and carries a shimmering blue bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Akura Malice was pushing the Titan away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Akura Malice is present and would not let her daughter face a Dreadgod without providing an escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Akura Malice closed her fist around the cloudship.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Malice wears amethyst armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Malice uses the World of Night technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Malice would not let those who stand in a Monarch's way live.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Akura Malice healed Lindon's wounds with a single word.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Malice was once the Sage of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Akura Malice wears a violet dress and silver chains with amethysts in her hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon shouts for Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Akura Malice personally delivered a message across the Ashwind continent.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Malice has a will that fights for control of Mercy's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Malice had children named Mercy and Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon infused the brew with a scale from Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Malice watched over most of the fight against the Weeping Dragon from far away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Akura Malice is known as the Queen of Shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Akura Malice wove wishes into the seventh page of the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Akura Malice exceeded expectations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The character is known as Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Drosses are seeking a combat solution against Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Akura Malice is dead.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Akura Malice is an investigator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Akura Malice was seen drifting down from the sky to land next to Northstrider's body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
